nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Documents local Neon PostgreSQL guidance and operational rules used by agents when working with the project database.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment template defining the PostgreSQL and direct migration database URLs required by the app. It documents the Neon pooled runtime connection and direct migration connection without storing real credentials.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Repository guidance for agents working on Pins Hub, including build commands, Prisma and Neon rules, UI constraints, calculator behavior, and referrals requirements. It also embeds RTK command usage instructions for token-efficient shell work.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Claude-specific pointer file that delegates project instructions to AGENTS.md. It keeps assistant guidance centralized in the main repository agent document.

nodes.name: calculator-profiles.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the supported calculator profile codes used to select calculator configurations across calculator routes and data loaders.

nodes.name: db.ts
nodes.summary: Creates the shared Prisma client backed by PostgreSQL, validates DATABASE_URL safety, and reuses the Prisma client and pg pool during development.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses PrismaPg with pg Pool and stores instances on global in non-production to avoid repeated client creation during hot reloads.

nodes.name: start.sh
nodes.summary: Small shell helper that prints a startup message and runs the Next.js development server through the package dev script. It acts as a convenience entry point for local Pins Hub development.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Primary TypeScript configuration for the Next.js app, enabling strict checking, React JSX transform, bundler module resolution, incremental builds, JSON imports, and the Next compiler plugin. It controls the TypeScript surface used by application and route code.
nodes.languageNotes: The config uses Next.js bundler-oriented module resolution and noEmit because Next handles compilation output.

nodes.name: tsconfig.seed.json
nodes.summary: Secondary TypeScript configuration for seed or Node-oriented scripts. It extends the main TypeScript config while switching module output and resolution to CommonJS and Node.

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration that sets the build command to the repository's Vercel build script. This ensures production builds run Prisma generation before the Next.js build.

nodes.name: CalculatorClient.tsx
nodes.summary: Client-side EU/US calculator surface that manages quote designs, delivery helper state, VAT totals, copy actions, and the stable pricing breakdown UI. It composes shared design cost utilities with copy formatters and DesignCard controls.
nodes.languageNotes: Large React client component using hooks and memoized totals to keep calculator state and derived quote values synchronized.

nodes.name: CalculatorClient
nodes.summary: Renders and coordinates the main calculator UI, design list, quote totals, delivery helper, copy actions, modal focus handling, and VAT-aware pricing breakdowns.

nodes.name: copyFormatters.ts
nodes.summary: Formats customer-facing quote and delivery copy for EU, US client, and UK trade calculator flows. It centralizes VAT wording, garment summaries, print and embroidery details, and quote formatter selection by calculator profile.

nodes.name: getCustomerSubtotalExclVat
nodes.summary: Computes the customer subtotal excluding VAT from the major per-design cost buckets used by quote copy formatters.

nodes.name: formatEmbroiderySummary
nodes.summary: Builds a compact text summary of selected embroidery items for a design.

nodes.name: formatPositionSummary
nodes.summary: Builds a customer-readable print and embroidery position summary for a design and calculator profile.

nodes.name: formatGarmentSummary
nodes.summary: Combines garment code, brand, name, colour, and work summary into a quote line.

nodes.name: formatEuQuoteCopy
nodes.summary: Formats EU customer quote text with 27 percent VAT-inclusive totals and digitizing fee wording.

nodes.name: formatUsClientQuoteCopy
nodes.summary: Formats US client quote text with configurable VAT rate, subtotal, VAT amount, and final total lines.

nodes.name: formatUkTradeQuoteCopy
nodes.summary: Formats UK trade quote text from valid design breakdowns using trade-specific garment, print, and embroidery summaries.

nodes.name: formatDeliveryCopy
nodes.summary: Formats delivery helper copy with country, box count, markup, VAT, and total delivery values.

nodes.name: getQuoteFormatter
nodes.summary: Selects the quote copy formatter for the active calculator profile.

nodes.name: UkTradeCalculatorClient.tsx
nodes.summary: Client-side UK trade calculator that manages multiple quote designs, computes trade-specific screen print and embroidery costs, and copies excl. VAT quote text. It coordinates the UK trade design card, screen print price tables, and aggregate totals.
nodes.languageNotes: Large React client component keeps pricing calculations local to the client and uses exported static price tables for deterministic totals.

nodes.name: getSelectedEmbroideryEntries
nodes.summary: Returns selected UK trade embroidery items with numeric stitch counts.

nodes.name: formatUkTradeQuoteCopy
nodes.summary: Formats UK trade quote text from valid design breakdowns using trade-specific garment, print, and embroidery summaries.

nodes.name: calculateUkTradeItemBreakdown
nodes.summary: Calculates one UK trade design breakdown including garment base, screen print setup and run costs, embroidery costs, PK markup, and missing-price reasons.

nodes.name: copyToClipboard
nodes.summary: Copies quote text using the Clipboard API with a textarea fallback for older browser contexts.

nodes.name: UkTradeCalculatorClient
nodes.summary: Renders the UK trade calculator, manages design state, computes aggregate totals, and exposes quote copy and design editing workflows.

nodes.name: UkTradeDesignCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive UK trade design editor for selecting garments, quantities, screen print positions, colour counts, embroidery stitch counts, and item labels. It reuses shared print positions while applying UK trade-specific embroidery inputs.

nodes.name: GarmentSelector
nodes.summary: Renders a searchable garment selector with local query state and filtered garment results.

nodes.name: UkTradeDesignCard
nodes.summary: Renders the UK trade per-design editor and updates quantity, garment, print, embroidery, item label, and PK markup state.

nodes.name: data.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side data loader for UK trade calculator garments using Prisma and a cache tag helper. It filters active garments for the uk-trade calculator profile and orders them for selector display.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Next.js unstable_cache with a tag helper so garment data can be cached and invalidated by calculator profile.

nodes.name: getUkTradeGarmentsTag
nodes.summary: Returns the cache tag used to invalidate UK trade garment data.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Next.js App Router page for the UK trade calculator. It opts into dynamic rendering, loads UK trade garment data, renders the Back to Hub link, and mounts the UK trade calculator client.
nodes.languageNotes: Calls connection() to force dynamic rendering before loading calculator data in an async server component.

nodes.name: UkTradeCalculatorPage
nodes.summary: Loads UK trade garments and renders the page shell with Back to Hub and the calculator client.

nodes.name: DesignCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Shared calculator design card and pricing helper module for garment selection, print positions, embroidery options, PK markup, and per-design cost breakdowns. It exports constants and utility functions consumed by calculator clients and quote formatters.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines exported pure pricing helpers with client-only form components in one TSX module.

nodes.name: formatDesignEmbroiderySizeLabel
nodes.summary: Formats a design embroidery size key into its display label.

nodes.name: getSelectedDesignEmbroideryEntries
nodes.summary: Returns selected shared design embroidery entries with labels and pricing metadata.

nodes.name: isPrintPositionSelected
nodes.summary: Checks whether a print position has a positive colour count on a design.

nodes.name: getPrintUnitPrices
nodes.summary: Looks up customer and production print unit prices for a design position and colour count.

nodes.name: calculateDesignCosts
nodes.summary: Calculates shared per-design customer and production costs across garments, print positions, markups, embroidery, and digitizing fees.

nodes.name: GarmentSelector
nodes.summary: Renders a searchable garment selector with local query state and filtered garment results.

nodes.name: DesignCard
nodes.summary: Renders the shared per-design calculator editor with garment search, print positions, embroidery controls, and PK markup inputs.

nodes.name: layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Defines the Hub route layout, wrapping Hub pages in the dark brand shell with the shared sidebar and responsive main content area.
nodes.languageNotes: App Router layout component receives children and composes persistent route chrome around nested pages.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Implements the Pins Hub home dashboard with the shared sidebar, hero summary, live tool count, and navigation cards for operational tools.

nodes.name: HubSidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Client-side Hub navigation sidebar with brand imagery, route-aware active states, compact theme toggle, and a staging updates panel.

nodes.name: HubLayout
nodes.summary: Composes the Hub section frame by rendering HubSidebar beside the nested page content inside a responsive dark container.

nodes.name: Home
nodes.summary: Builds the home dashboard UI with brand hero content and NavigationCard links into the Hub tool areas.

nodes.name: HubSidebar
nodes.summary: Renders route-aware sidebar navigation from navItems, applies active link styling, and includes theme and staging controls.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview for Pins Hub, an internal operations app covering quote calculators, garment reference data, PK Tax, referrals, and operational reference copy. It documents the Next.js, React, TypeScript, Prisma, Neon, local setup, active routes, deployment notes, and safety constraints.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node package manifest for the Pins Hub Next.js app, defining development, build, Vercel build, migration, start, lint, and Prisma generation scripts. It pins the core runtime stack around Next.js 16, React 19, Prisma 7, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, and PDF/export helper libraries.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Understand Anything configuration storing project analysis preferences such as output language.

nodes.name: PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
nodes.summary: Project context document describing active routes, operational constraints, feature areas, database runtime, and verification commands.

nodes.name: UI_MANUAL_UPDATE_GUIDE.md
nodes.summary: Manual UI update guide capturing detailed instructions and workflows for maintaining Pins Hub interface behavior.

nodes.name: eslint.config.mjs
nodes.summary: ESLint configuration wiring Next.js and TypeScript linting for the project.
